subprograms.name: Generate_Number

documentation.description: Generate a uniform random integer in the range 0 to N-1, inclusive

subprograms.name: Generate_Number_Bits

documentation.description:
Generate a uniformly distributed random integer in the range 0 to
2^N-1, inclusive

subprograms.name: Number
subprograms.code: function Number (State : Generator; N : Big_Integer) return Big_Integer

documentation.description: Generate a uniform random integer in the range 0 to N-1, inclusive

subprograms.name: Number_Bits
subprograms.code:
function Number_Bits (State : Generator; N : Unsigned_Long)
   return Big_Integer

documentation.description:
Generate a uniformly distributed random integer in the range 0 to
2^N-1, inclusive
